name: 3dsvg
description: The easiest way to turn SVGs into interactive React 3D components
readme_summary: 3dsvg is a monorepo providing a React component for creating interactive 3D visualizations from SVGs and a web-based visual editor to design and export these 3D objects. It simplifies the process of turning 2D vector graphics into dynamic 3D experiences.
key_features: Visual editor for designing 3D objects from SVGs
Multiple input methods (Text, Pixel Editor, SVG Code, File Upload)
Export to PNG, MP4, WebM, GLB, STL, OBJ, PLY
Interactive canvas with drag rotation, scroll zoom, and orbit
primary_use_case: Enabling developers to easily convert static SVG files into interactive 3D components within React applications, and providing a user-friendly visual editor for creating and exporting 3D assets.
cover_image_prompt: A magical 3D printer seamlessly transforming a flat, intricate SVG logo into a vibrant, spinning 3D model that floats in the air. The printer has subtle digital interfaces showing material options and animation settings. Around the floating model, small, glowing particles represent data flowing from the SVG input to the 3D output. The background is a clean, modern workshop with soft, ambient lighting. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and wonder, showcasing the effortless conversion of 2D vector art into dynamic 3D objects. The repository name '3dsvg' is subtly etched onto the printer's base.

name: donutbrowser
readme_summary: Donut Browser is an open-source anti-detect browser built with Rust, offering robust privacy and profile management. It allows users to create and manage unlimited isolated browser profiles, each with its own unique fingerprint, cookies, and extensions, powered by Chromium and Firefox engines with advanced spoofing capabilities.
key_features: Chromium & Firefox engines with advanced fingerprint spoofing
Proxy and VPN support per profile
primary_use_case: Managing multiple, isolated browser environments for tasks requiring distinct digital footprints, such as web scraping, testing, or maintaining anonymity online.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, multi-layered donut where each layer represents a distinct, isolated browser profile. A central character, a friendly donut mascot, is carefully placing unique digital 'fingerprints' onto each layer. Some layers are connected to different colored pipes representing proxies and VPNs, while others have small icons of browser extensions. In the background, subtle code snippets and data streams flow, hinting at the browser's automation capabilities. The overall scene is clean, colorful, and uses a 3D isometric illustration style, with the 'Donut Browser' name subtly integrated into the scene's signage.

name: KrillinAI
description: Video translation and dubbing tool powered by LLMs. The video translator offers 100 language translations and one-click full-process deployment. The video translation output is optimized for platforms like YouTube，TikTok.   AI视频翻译配音工具，100种语言双向翻译，一键部署全流程，可以生抖音，小红书，哔哩哔哩，视频号，TikTok，Youtube等形态的内容成适配
readme_summary: KrillinAI is a Go-based tool for video translation and dubbing, offering end-to-end localization for cross-platform content. It supports over 100 languages, integrates speech recognition and LLM-based translation, and features voice cloning for professional-sounding dubs.
key_features: Video acquisition via yt-dlp or local upload
Automatic landscape/portrait video processing and subtitle layout
primary_use_case: Automated video translation and dubbing for creating multilingual, cross-platform video content.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, conceptual illustration of a multilingual video translator. Imagine a central, stylized 'KrillinAI' logo acting as a magical loom. From one side, raw video footage streams in as colorful threads. On the other side, these threads are expertly woven into perfectly translated and dubbed video streams, complete with subtitles, flowing out in various formats (like a YouTube play button, a TikTok icon, and a Bilibili logo). Digital particles representing different languages swirl around the loom. The overall mood is efficient, creative, and globally connected, rendered in a clean, modern 3D isometric style with bright, engaging colors.

name: qxresearch-event-1
description: Python hands on tutorial with 50+ Python Application (10 lines of code) By @xiaowuc2
readme_summary: This repository offers a collection of over 50 practical Python applications, each written with a maximum of 10 lines of code. It covers diverse areas like Machine Learning, GUI, Computer Vision, and API development, aiming to provide simple, understandable, and easily modifiable code examples for learning and experimentation.
key_features: Covers ML, DL, GUI, CV, API development
Includes Voice Recorder, PDF tools, Notifications, Audio Visualizer, Password Generator, and more
primary_use_case: To serve as a learning resource for Python developers, showcasing how to build various applications with minimal code, and to provide easily understandable examples for different programming concepts.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, magical toolbox overflowing with miniature, glowing Python code snippets. From the toolbox, a friendly, stylized robot hand is pulling out a small, intricate gadget (representing an application like a voice recorder or audio visualizer) and handing it to a curious learner. The background is a clean, bright workshop with subtle circuit board patterns. Small, stylized icons representing different application categories (like a sound wave for audio, a lock for security, a graph for ML) are scattered around. The overall mood is educational and inspiring, with a focus on simplicity and accessibility. The style should be a vibrant, 3D isometric illustration with soft lighting and clear, friendly character design.

name: TREK
description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
readme_summary: TREK is a self-hosted, real-time collaborative travel planner application. It offers features like interactive maps, budget tracking, packing lists, and a journal, all accessible via a Progressive Web App (PWA) with support for Single Sign-On (SSO).
primary_use_case: To provide individuals and groups with a comprehensive, self-hosted platform for planning and managing all aspects of their trips, from initial itinerary creation to budgeting and packing.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, antique world map spread across a sturdy wooden table, with glowing, translucent threads connecting various points of interest like cities and landmarks. A magnifying glass hovers over one thread, revealing a small, detailed scene of a traveler packing a suitcase. Beside the map, a digital tablet displays a clean interface showing a budget breakdown and a checklist. Subtle digital particles emanate from the tablet, suggesting real-time updates. The overall mood is adventurous and organized, with warm, inviting light. The art style is a 3D isometric illustration with rich textures and clear, intuitive iconography, embodying the TREK application's blend of travel planning and digital organization.
